title: Kubernetes_Node
description: Kubernetes_Node schema from Censys Platform API

architecture.description: The Architecture reported by the node.

container_runtime_version.description: ContainerRuntime Version reported by the node through runtime remote API (e.g. docker://1.5.0).

images.description: List of container images on this node

kernel_version.description: Kernel Version reported by the node from 'uname -r' (e.g. 3.16.0-0.bpo.4-amd64).

kube_proxy_version.description: KubeProxy Version reported by the node.

kubelet_version.description: Kubelet Version reported by the node.

operating_system.description: The Operating System reported by the node.

os_image.description: OS Image reported by the node from /etc/os-release (e.g. Debian GNU/Linux 7 (wheezy)).
